title: douglasia laevigata subsp. ciliolata
intro: Douglasia laevigata subsp. ciliolata, also known as the Alpine Bellwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Douglasia laevigata subsp. ciliolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also sometimes used in traditional folk remedies to promote overall well-being.
